LanguageData.WVC_Desc_LongRunningJoke_DoLeave: {0} has given up on this community.\n\n{0_pronoun} has decided to leave and pursue a better life elsewhere. You can try to arrest {0_objective} as {0_pronoun} leaves. Otherwise, you may still see {0_objective} again some day.
LanguageData.WVC_XaG_FaultyShapeDisease: {0} lost the {1} gene due to genetic overload.
